heading: Unsupported Commands
body:
Free clusters and Flex clusters don't support the following commands:

> **Note:** The commands available for clusters of all other tiers, M10 and
> larger, correspond to the privileges defined for the built-in
> Atlas MongoDB roles. To learn more about permissions, see
> [built-in role](manual/reference/built-in-roles).

- `_migrateClone`

- `_recvChunkAbort`

- `_recvChunkCommit`

- `_recvChunkStart`

- `_recvChunkStatus`

- `_transferMods`

- [appendOplogNote](manual/reference/privilege-actions)

- [applyOps](manual/reference/command/applyOps)

- [authenticate](manual/reference/command/authenticate)

- [autoCompact](manual/reference/command/autoCompact)

- [authSchemaUpgrade](manual/reference/privilege-actions)

- [cleanupOrphaned](manual/reference/command/cleanupOrphaned)

- `cloneCollection`

- [cloneCollectionAsCapped](manual/reference/command/cloneCollectionAsCapped)

- [compact](manual/reference/command/compact)

- `copydbgetnonce`

- `copydbsaslstart`

- [createRole](manual/reference/command/createRole)

- [db.collection.getSearchIndexes()](manual/reference/method/db.collection.getSearchIndexes)

- [createUser](manual/reference/command/createUser)

- `currentOpCtx`

- [dataSize](manual/reference/command/dataSize)

- [dbHash](manual/reference/command/dbHash)

- [dropAllRolesFromDatabase](manual/reference/command/dropAllRolesFromDatabase)

- [dropAllUsersFromDatabase](manual/reference/command/dropAllUsersFromDatabase)

- [dropConnections](manual/reference/command/dropConnections)

- [dropRole](manual/reference/command/dropRole)

- `enableFreeMonitoring`

- `forcerror`

- [fsync](manual/reference/command/fsync)

- [fsyncUnlock](manual/reference/command/fsyncUnlock)

- `getDiagnosticData`

- `getPrevError`

- [getShardMap](manual/reference/command/getShardMap)

- [grantPrivilegesToRole](manual/reference/command/grantPrivilegesToRole)

- [grantRolesToRole](manual/reference/command/grantRolesToRole)

- [grantRolesToUser](manual/reference/command/grantRolesToUser)

- `handshake`

- [hostInfo](manual/reference/command/hostInfo)

- [invalidateUserCache](manual/reference/command/invalidateUserCache)

- [killAllSessions](manual/reference/command/killAllSessions)

- [killAllSessionsByPattern](manual/reference/command/killAllSessionsByPattern)

- [killAnySession](manual/reference/privilege-actions)

- [killSessions](manual/reference/command/killSessions)

- [$listLocalSessions](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/listLocalSessions)

- [$listSessions](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/listSessions)

- [lockInfo](manual/reference/command/lockInfo)

- [logRotate](manual/reference/command/logRotate)

- [logApplicationMessage](manual/reference/command/logApplicationMessage)

- `shardedFinish`

- [mapReduce](manual/reference/command/mapReduce)

- [planCacheClear](manual/reference/command/planCacheClear)

- [planCacheClearFilters](manual/reference/command/planCacheClearFilters)

- [planCacheListFilters](manual/reference/command/planCacheListFilters)

- `planCacheListPlans`

- `planCacheListQueryShapes`

- [$planCacheStats](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/planCacheStats) aggregation pipeline stage

- [planCacheSetFilter](manual/reference/command/planCacheSetFilter)

- [reIndex](manual/reference/command/reIndex)

- `repairCursor`

- `repairDatabase`

- `replSetDeclareElectionWinner`

- `replSetElect`

- [replSetFreeze](manual/reference/command/replSetFreeze)

- `replSetFresh`

- [replSetGetConfig](manual/reference/command/replSetGetConfig)

- `replSetGetRBID`

- [replSetGetStatus](manual/reference/command/replSetGetStatus)

- [replSetHeartbeat](manual/reference/privilege-actions)

- [replSetMaintenance](manual/reference/command/replSetMaintenance)

- [replSetReconfig](manual/reference/command/replSetReconfig)

- `replSetRequestVotes`

- [replSetStepDown](manual/reference/command/replSetStepDown)

- `replSetStepUp`

- [replSetSyncFrom](manual/reference/command/replSetSyncFrom)

- `replSetUpdatePosition`

- [revokePrivilegesFromRole](manual/reference/command/revokePrivilegesFromRole)

- [revokeRolesFromRole](manual/reference/command/revokeRolesFromRole)
